text:
Data Entry Error Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the reason for modification of the prior erroneous record is related to a data entry error. 0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2023
621 X0900C_MDFCTN_SFTWR_ERR_CD X0900C_MDFCTN_SFTWR_ERR_CD X0900C Reason for Modification: Software Product Error Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the reason for modification of the prior erroneous record is related to a software product error. 0=Not
